ConfirmText: Are you sure you want to reset all trees?
DebugWarning: Please note you have debug mode turned on. It isn't recommended to leave this on unless you have a purpose for it.
cfg.debug_logging.name: Debug Logging
cfg.debug_logging.desc: Write detailed diagnostic info to the BepInEx log while you play. Turn this on before reporting a bug.
cfg.tree_search_distance.name: Tree Search Distance
cfg.tree_search_distance.desc: How far around a remembered tree to look when deciding whether the world copy should be removed. Default 2 catches the same tree without grabbing its neighbours.
cfg.instant_stump_removal.name: Instant Stump Removal
cfg.instant_stump_removal.desc: On: stumps disappear the moment a tree falls. Off: stumps stay until you remove them yourself.
cfg.reset_trees.name: Reset Trees
cfg.reset_trees.desc: Restore every felled tree on the next game launch. The mod's record of which trees you've chopped is wiped.
cfg.check_for_updates.name: Check for Updates
cfg.check_for_updates.desc: Show a notice on the main menu when a newer version of this mod is available on NexusMods. Click the notice to open the mod's page.
